reference: I have had a very heavy feeling in my chest for about three weeks now. I am very nauseous and dizzy, and I am fatigued and just overwhelmingly sleepy. I fall asleep everywhere and anywhere. I have a headache that will not go away, and it's such a scary feeling. I have wanted to go to the emergency room. Also, pregnancy is a possibility, but I am not quite sure that would be it.
